channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Andy Jassy used a chicken wing club to network when moving to Seattle
item.description: Amazon's CEO hosted weekly chicken wing nights to build genuine connections, a lesson for Gen Z.

item.title: Garmin Cirqa: Everything Known About The Whoop Rival So Far
item.description: The Garmin Cirqa, a lifestyle-focused wearable, could launch soon as a Whoop rival.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today: Saturday, April 25 Clues And Answers (#1049)
item.description: Hints and answers for today's NYT Connections puzzle to maintain your winning streak.

item.title: Lyft's head of growth on transformative move into London's black cab sector
item.description: Lyft's acquisition of Gett UK makes it the largest app for London's black cabs.

item.title: Gen Alpha relies on ChatGPT for emails; time for a Digital Harm Tax
item.description: I nearly lost my own life to social media. Phone bans and lawsuits aren't enough.
